title: Factory Shared Job-State Record (RFC-0016)
description: The durable, shared representation of one in-flight or completed PARR job (a plan, a build, or a verify). RFC-0016 Phase 1 replaces each service's per-pod in-memory store (PFactory `_sessions`, AIFactory/TFactory `running_tasks`) and pod-local SQLite/emptyDir with a row of this shape in shared Postgres, so (a) any control-plane replica can read/advance any job, (b) the admission cap/queue survive a pod restart, and (c) Phase 2 k8s Jobs report progress back to the same record. Artifacts are NOT inlined here; they live in object storage and are referenced by `artifacts[]`. Lifecycle classification reuses apis/status-taxonomy.json.

schema_version.description: Job-state record version. Additive changes keep this; breaking changes bump it.

job_id.description: Stable unique id for this job (service-assigned, e.g. a UUID or the service's task_id/session_id). Primary key.

correlation_key.description: RFC-0001 correlation key (the upstream GitHub issue number) threading this job across PFactory/AIFactory/TFactory/CFactory. Null until known.

lifecycle_state.description: Canonical lifecycle state from apis/status-taxonomy.json. `queued` covers admission-queued jobs waiting for a concurrency slot (RFC-0016).

service_status.description: The raw service-native status string (e.g. PFactory 'emitted', AIFactory 'human_review', TFactory 'review_initial_complete'), mapped to lifecycle_state via the status taxonomy.

phase.description: Optional finer-grained phase within the job (e.g. AIFactory 'coding', TFactory 'review_initial_complete').

attempt.description: Execution attempt counter (RFC-0008 provider failover / restart increments this).

admission.description: RFC-0016 admission-control bookkeeping so the cap/queue are durable, not in-memory.

started_at.description: When a concurrency slot was granted and execution began.

worker_ref.description: Phase 2 execution-unit reference. Null in Phase 1 (in-pod subprocess). Set when the job runs as a k8s Job.

artifacts.description: Object-store references to this job's outputs (workspace tarball, build artifacts, test reports, evidence). Never inline blobs. See apis/concurrency-conventions.md for the key layout.

role.description: e.g. workspace, build, test-report, evidence, log.

result.description: Terminal result payload (service-specific): e.g. PFactory emitted epic/issue numbers, AIFactory PR url, TFactory verdict + VAL level + per-lane pass/fail. MUST be set when lifecycle_state is terminal (done/failed).

usage.description: Resource/cost accounting, aligned with RFC-0014 billing modes.

error.description: Human-readable failure reason when lifecycle_state is failed/stuck. Required when failed (never-overclaim: a terminal failure must carry a reason).
